name: No Sauce Tomato Pizza Topping
recipeIngredient: oregano, basil or mint to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the pizza dough lightly with olive oil.
2. Layer the diced tomatoes and crumbled feta cheese on top of the dough.
3. If using, add the optional mozzarella cheese.
4. Season with oregano, basil, or mint to taste.
